scripts.lint: node --check scripts/telecom-monthly-claim.js && node --check scripts/audit-slider-distance.js && node --check scripts/debug-pushplus-inbox.js && node --check scripts/sms-inbox-server.js && node --check scripts/create-failure-issue.js && node --check scripts/resolve-run-log-outcome.js && node --check src/*.js && bash -n scripts/write-run-log-branch.sh && bash -n scripts/start-chrome-cdp.sh && bash -n scripts/start-chrome-cdp-linux.sh
scripts.claim:cdp: bash scripts/start-chrome-cdp.sh && BROWSER_CDP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9222 TELECOM_REQUIRE_REAL_CHROME=true TELECOM_MINIMAL_LOGIN=true TELECOM_SLIDER_MODE=api DRY_RUN_BEFORE_FINAL_SUBMIT=true node scripts/telecom-monthly-claim.js
